nasb.text: “The Lord possessed me at the beginning of His way, Before His works of old.

esv.text: “The Lord  possessed me at the beginning of his work, the first of his acts of old.

cnv.text: 在耶和華創造的開始， 在太初創造一切以先，就有了我。

ccb.text: “在耶和华造物的起头， 在太初万物被造以前， 就已经有我。

csbs.text: 在耶和华创世之始， 在太初创造以先， 他就拥有了我。
